title: Parkio Daily for July 7, 2026
teaser: Hollywood Studios adds September Extended Evening Hours; July crowds hit five-year low across Walt Disney World.

rides.name: Space Mountain
rides.note: Magic Kingdom is running unusually light today

rides.name: Test Track
rides.note: EPCOT wait times lowest in recent memory

breaking.title: Hollywood Studios gets September Extended Evening Hours slot
breaking.body: Walt Disney World has added Extended Evening Hours at Hollywood Studios for one September date, replacing the usual Magic Kingdom slot. Deluxe resort guests can stay from 9 to 11 p.m.

parkioInsight.text: Hollywood Studios evening hours tend to offer walk-on access to Rise of the Resistance and Tower of Terror. Guests staying at deluxe resorts may find better value here than the usual Magic Kingdom slot this month.

bignews.title: July crowds hit lowest levels since September 2021
bignews.body: Wait times across Walt Disney World over Independence Day weekend and into this week have dropped to the lowest levels recorded since September 2021, despite sold-out Annual Passholder park reservations.

parkioInsight.text: Every park is likely seeing short waits through mid-July. Spontaneous visits and rope-drop skipping may actually work well this week, though Lightning Lane still saves time on headliners during midday heat.

bignews.title: Carousel of Progress closed for 2027 updates
bignews.body: Walt Disney's Carousel of Progress at Magic Kingdom closed July 6 for a multi-month refurbishment. The attraction is expected to reopen in 2027 with updates to its final scene.

parkioInsight.text: Tomorrowland loses one of its air-conditioned breaks. On hot afternoons, consider the Tomorrowland Transit Authority PeopleMover or move to Fantasyland for indoor queue relief instead.

bignews.title: Disneyland $59 evening ticket sold out in under a week
bignews.body: Disneyland's discounted $59 evening admission ticket for select dates sold out in less than seven days. A new $71 Southern California resident ticket offer is now available for summer and Halloween dates.

parkioInsight.text: High demand for discount tickets often signals heavier-than-expected turnout on eligible dates. Guests using the new resident offer may want to target weekday evenings when the park typically clears out after dinner.

bignews.title: Disneyland Resort marks one billionth guest milestone
bignews.body: Disneyland Resort celebrated its one billionth guest across Disneyland Park and Disney California Adventure since the resort opened in 1955. A ceremony was held at the Disneyland entrance.

parkioInsight.text: Commemorative merchandise and photo ops tied to the milestone may appear near the entrance or Emporium. Worth a quick stop if you collect limited-run Disney history items.

topstories.title: EPCOT Portraits of Courage exhibit closes permanently
topstories.body: The Portraits of Courage exhibit at EPCOT, featuring paintings by President George W. Bush of military veterans, closed permanently following an extended July Fourth run.

parkioInsight.text: Guests looking for a quiet air-conditioned gallery experience at EPCOT now have fewer options. The Odyssey pavilion may see heavier foot traffic as guests seek indoor breaks.

topstories.title: Three July ride closures announced at Disneyland
topstories.body: Three attractions at Disneyland and Disney California Adventure will be closed for maintenance during July, impacting guest itineraries.

parkioInsight.text: July closures tend to target slower attractions during off-peak summer weeks. Check the Disneyland app before rope drop to adjust touring plans and avoid wasted walks to shuttered rides.

topstories.title: Fantasmic debuts alternate finale after technical issue
topstories.body: A recent showing of Fantasmic at Hollywood Studios ended without its traditional finale aboard the Mark Twain boat due to a technical failure. Guests reportedly applauded the unexpected variation.

parkioInsight.text: Fantasmic occasionally experiences downtime or modified endings. Guests aiming for the full show may want to attend a second night if their schedule allows, though most elements typically run as planned.

topstories.title: New Cake Bake Shop cotton candy slice draws strong reviews
topstories.body: A new $22 cotton candy cake slice at Disney World's Cake Bake Shop is earning positive guest reactions for flavor and presentation.

parkioInsight.text: Cake Bake Shop often sells out of popular slices by mid-afternoon. Guests wanting to try the new cotton candy option should visit before 2 p.m. or make a reservation for sit-down service.

topstories.title: TRON Lightcycle queue screens show burn-in damage
topstories.body: Queue screens at TRON Lightcycle Run in Magic Kingdom are displaying visible burn-in from repeated lightcycle imagery, a cosmetic issue noticed by guests waiting in line.

parkioInsight.text: The burn-in does not affect ride operation but may detract from the queue experience. Guests sensitive to show quality issues might prefer riding during lower-wait windows when queue time is minimal.

topstories.title: Fourteen Walt Disney World restaurant menus updated
topstories.body: Menu changes rolled out across 14 Walt Disney World dining locations this week, affecting both quick-service and table-service restaurants.

parkioInsight.text: Menu refreshes often include limited-time items that disappear within weeks. Guests with dining reservations today should ask servers about new additions before ordering.

topstories.title: Boatwrights cornbread returns to Port Orleans menu
topstories.body: Walt Disney World reversed a controversial menu cut by restoring cornbread to Boatwright's Dining Hall at Port Orleans Resort following guest feedback.

parkioInsight.text: Boatwright's walk-up availability tends to improve during weekday lunch hours. Guests staying at Port Orleans or visiting Disney Springs may find same-day seating easier than weekend evenings.

icymi.title: Mickey's of Glendale returns to D23 with Imagineering collection
icymi.body: The Mickey's of Glendale booth will return to D23 2026 with a new Walt Disney Imagineering merchandise collection for convention attendees.

icymi.title: New Haunted Mansion merchandise arrives online
icymi.body: A new Haunted Mansion collection launched on DisneyStore.com, featuring apparel, accessories, and home goods inspired by the attraction.

icymi.title: Disney and Formula 1 continue partnership for 2026 season
icymi.body: Disney and Formula 1 announced continued collaboration for the 2026 race season, building on the 2025 Las Vegas Grand Prix debut with Mickey and Friends track-side activations.

icymi.title: Cheapest Mickey's Not So Scary Halloween Party dates sold out
icymi.body: The lowest-priced ticket dates for 2026 Mickey's Not So Scary Halloween Party at Magic Kingdom have sold out, leaving higher-tier pricing for remaining August and September nights.

spotlight.title: Secret walk-up method gets you into Oga's Cantina without a reservation
spotlight.body: Guests at Hollywood Studios can access Oga's Cantina without an advance reservation by joining the walk-up list during off-peak hours, typically mid-afternoon weekdays. The lounge often has last-minute openings when the park is not at capacity.

parkioInsight.text: Walk-up availability at Oga's tends to open between 2 and 4 p.m. on weekdays when lunch crowds clear out. Guests willing to wait 20 to 40 minutes often secure a spot without a 60-day booking.
